title: sophora mollis subsp. duthiei
intro: Sophora mollis subsp. duthiei, also known as Himalayan Sophora or Duthie's Sophora, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which are known to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sophora mollis subsp. duthiei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for various herbal preparations.
